zh.lifeSummary: 當Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar於1115年出生在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林時，他的父親Gille Chlerig Earl of Mar25歲，母親Orabile Gillicher25歲。他於1145年與Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1182年3月30日在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪享年67歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭費伏聖 安德魯斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar于1115年出生在苏格兰費伏登福姆林时，他的父亲Gille Chlerig Earl of Mar25岁，母亲Orabile Gillicher25岁。他于1145年与Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar在苏格兰費伏登福姆林结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1182年3月30日在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪享年67岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰費伏聖 安德魯斯。

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Cuong, Minh, Lien, Muoi, Thanh, Tho, Tieu, Vinh, Anh, Beo, Binh, Chau.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 麥 (see   Mai   2) and 莫 (see   Mo   1).
Vietnamese (Mạc): from Chinese 莫 ‘nothing; nonexistent’; see Mo 1.

variants.name: Mai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Hoa, Son, Dung, Long, Binh, Minh, Thu, Hue, Huong, Thuy.  Chinese Chi, Hong, Ho, Sang, Han, Hang, Jian, Li, Man, Mei, Sen, Wei.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 麥, meaning ‘wheat’ in Chinese: (i) from Mai Qiu (麥丘), the title of a man in the state of Qi (located mainly in present-day Shandong province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), who, despite being very old, came to celebrate the birthday of the Duke Huan of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, died 643  BC ). His descendants inherited 麥, the first part of his title, as their surname. (ii) borne by descendants of Mai Tie Zhang (麥鐵杖), a famous general during the Sui dynasty (581–618  AD ). His descendants were scattered around southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 買, meaning ‘buy’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of the king Song Weizi, founder of the state of Song. (ii) borne by descendants of the Duke Dao of Xu (ruler of the state of Xu, 546–523  BC ), possibly inheriting his personal name. (iii) from the first element of the personal name Mai Zhu Chu (買朱鉏), style name of an official who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) it has also been traced back to other ethnic groups in northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Morggan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Welsh Morcant , traditionally a boy's name. In Britain since the late 1990s the name has become equally popular as a girl's name, perhaps adopted with conscious reference to  King Arthur's  jealous stepsister  Morgan le Fay . Elsewhere in the English-speaking world, especially in North America, where it also enjoys considerable popularity, it is used predominantly for girls.

variants.name: Morcant
meanings: Traditional: composed of an unexplained first element + a second representing the Old Celtic element cant ‘circle; completion’.

en.lifeSummary: When Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar was born in 1115, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, his father, Gille Chlerig Earl of Mar, was 25 and his mother, Orabile Gillicher, was 25. He married Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar in 1145, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 30 March 1182, in Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 67, and was buried in St Andrews, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar est né en 1115, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, son père, Gille Chlerig Earl of Mar, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Orabile Gillicher, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar en 1145, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 30 mars 1182, à Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à St Andrews, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar 1115 in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gille Chlerig Earl of Mar 25 und seine Mutter Orabile Gillicher 25. Er hat 1145 in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 30. März 1182 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland und wurde in St Andrews, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar è nato il nel 1115 nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, il suo padre, Gille Chlerig Earl of Mar, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Orabile Gillicher, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar nel 1145, nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 30 marzo 1182, nel Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a St Andrews, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Marが1115年にスコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインで生まれた時，父Gille Chlerig Earl of Marは25歳，母Orabile Gillicherは25歳であった。1145年にスコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインでAgnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Marと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1182年3月30日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアアバーディーンで67歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドフィフスト アンドリュースにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar(이)가 1115년 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gille Chlerig Earl of Mar(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Orabile Gillicher(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1145년 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1182년 3월 30일 스컷랜드 압르디실르 압르디에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 스트 앤드루스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar nasceu em 1115, em Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Gille Chlerig Earl of Mar, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Orabile Gillicher, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar em 1145, em Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 30 de março de 1182, em Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em St Andrews, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Morggan Mac Gylocher 2nd Earl of Mar родился в 1115 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Gille Chlerig Earl of Mar было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Orabile Gillicher, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar в 1145 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 30 марта 1182 г. в местности абирдин, абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности ст андрюс, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Agnes de Harcourt Comitissa de Mar en 1145, en Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 30 de marzo de 1182, en Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en St Andrews, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido.
